 `./apps/web/src/lib/accent-color.ts`

```text
     1→import 'server-only'
     2→
     3→import chroma from 'chroma-js'
     4→import Color from 'colorjs.io'
     5→
     6→import { createPngNoiseBackground } from './noise'
     7→
     8→/**
     9→ * 将十六进制颜色转换为OKLCH字符串
    10→ */
    11→export const hexToOklchString = (hex: string) => new Color(hex).oklch
    12→
    13→/**
    14→ * 默认背景色
    15→ */
    16→export const DEFAULT_BACKGROUNDS = {
    17→  light: 'rgb(250, 250, 250)',
    18→  dark: 'rgb(0, 2, 18)',
    19→} as const
    20→
    21→/**
    22→ * 颜色样式生成配置
    23→ */
    24→export interface AccentColorStyleConfig {
    25→  /** 主题颜色映射 */
    26→  colors: {
    27→    light: string
    28→    dark: string
    29→  }
    30→  /** 是否生成噪声背景 */
    31→  withNoise?: boolean
    32→  /** 是否使用themed类选择器 */
    33→  useThemedClass?: boolean
    34→  /** 自定义根背景混合比例 */
    35→  mixRatio?: {
    36→    light: number
    37→    dark: number
    38→  }
    39→}
    40→
    41→/**
    42→ * 生成主题色相关的CSS样式
    43→ */
    44→export async function generateAccentColorStyle(
    45→  config: AccentColorStyleConfig,
    46→): Promise<string> {
    47→  const {
    48→    colors,
    49→    withNoise = false,
    50→    useThemedClass = false,
    51→    mixRatio = { light: 0.05, dark: 0.12 },
    52→  } = config
    53→
    54→  const lightOklch = hexToOklchString(colors.light)
    55→  const darkOklch = hexToOklchString(colors.dark)
    56→
    57→  const [hl, sl, ll] = lightOklch
    58→  const [hd, sd, ld] = darkOklch
    59→
    60→  let cssContent = ''
    61→
    62→  // 生成噪声背景
    63→  if (withNoise) {
    64→    const [lightBgImage, darkBgImage] = await Promise.all([
    65→      createPngNoiseBackground(colors.light),
    66→      createPngNoiseBackground(colors.dark),
    67→    ])
    68→
    69→    const selector = useThemedClass ? 'html.themed' : 'html'
    70→    cssContent += `
    71→        ${selector}[data-theme='light'].noise body::before {
    72→          background-image: ${lightBgImage}
    73→        }
    74→        ${selector}[data-theme='dark'].noise body::before {
    75→          background-image: ${darkBgImage}
    76→        }`
    77→  }
    78→
    79→  // 生成主题色变量 (DaisyUI v5 使用 --color-accent，值为完整 oklch)
    80→  const themeSelector = useThemedClass ? 'html.themed' : 'html'
    81→  cssContent += `
    82→        ${themeSelector}[data-theme='light'], .rich-content[data-theme='light'] {
    83→          --color-accent: oklch(${hl} ${sl} ${ll});
    84→        }
    85→        ${themeSelector}[data-theme='dark'], .rich-content[data-theme='dark'] {
    86→          --color-accent: oklch(${hd} ${sd} ${ld});
    87→        }`
    88→
    89→  // 生成根背景色 (DaisyUI 用 :where() 特异性为 0，我们用更高特异性覆盖)
    90→  const lightRootBg = chroma
    91→    .mix(DEFAULT_BACKGROUNDS.light, colors.light, mixRatio.light, 'rgb')
    92→    .hex()
    93→  const darkRootBg = chroma
    94→    .mix(DEFAULT_BACKGROUNDS.dark, colors.dark, mixRatio.dark, 'rgb')
    95→    .hex()
    96→
    97→  if (useThemedClass) {
    98→    cssContent += `
    99→        html.themed[data-theme='light'] {
   100→          --footer-bg: ${lightRootBg};
   101→        }
   102→        html.themed[data-theme='dark'] {
   103→          --footer-bg: ${darkRootBg};
   104→        }`
   105→  } else {
   106→    cssContent += `
   107→        :root[data-theme='light'] {
   108→          --footer-bg: ${lightRootBg};
   109→        }
   110→        :root[data-theme='dark'] {
   111→          --footer-bg: ${darkRootBg};
   112→        }`
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  return cssContent
   116→}
   117→
   118→/**
   119→ * 单色主题样式生成（用于页面级别的颜色覆盖）
   120→ */
   121→export async function generateSingleColorStyle(
   122→  color: string,
   123→  options: {
   124→    withNoise?: boolean
   125→    useThemedClass?: boolean
   126→    mixRatio?: { light: number; dark: number }
   127→  } = {},
   128→): Promise<string> {
   129→  return generateAccentColorStyle({
   130→    colors: {
   131→      light: color,
   132→      dark: color,
   133→    },
   134→    ...options,
   135→  })
   136→}
   137→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/lib/glow.server.ts`

```text
     1→import 'server-only'
     2→
     3→import { hexToHsl } from './color'
     4→
     5→const SOFT_HUES = [
     6→  { name: 'dawn', hue: 25 },
     7→  { name: 'sunrise', hue: 35 },
     8→  { name: 'morning', hue: 45 },
     9→  { name: 'spring', hue: 85 },
    10→  { name: 'sky', hue: 200 },
    11→  { name: 'twilight', hue: 220 },
    12→  { name: 'lavender', hue: 270 },
    13→  { name: 'rose', hue: 340 },
    14→  { name: 'coral', hue: 15 },
    15→  { name: 'mint', hue: 160 },
    16→  { name: 'peach', hue: 20 },
    17→  { name: 'sage', hue: 120 },
    18→]
    19→
    20→type GlowShape = 'circle' | 'ellipse-h' | 'ellipse-v' | 'blob'
    21→
    22→export interface GlowOrb {
    23→  id: number
    24→  x: number
    25→  y: number
    26→  width: number
    27→  height: number
    28→  blur: number
    29→  opacity: number
    30→  hue: number
    31→  saturation: number
    32→  lightnessLight: number
    33→  lightnessDark: number
    34→  shape: GlowShape
    35→  delay: number
    36→}
    37→
    38→function hashString(str: string): number {
    39→  let hash = 0
    40→  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    41→    const char = str.codePointAt(i)!
    42→    hash = (hash << 5) - hash + char
    43→    hash = hash & hash
    44→  }
    45→  return Math.abs(hash)
    46→}
    47→
    48→function seededRandom(initialSeed: number): () => number {
    49→  let s = initialSeed
    50→  return function () {
    51→    s = (s * 1103515245 + 12345) & 0x7fffffff
    52→    return s / 0x7fffffff
    53→  }
    54→}
    55→
    56→function getShapeBorderRadius(shape: GlowShape): string {
    57→  switch (shape) {
    58→    case 'circle':
    59→    case 'ellipse-h':
    60→    case 'ellipse-v':
    61→      return '50%'
    62→    case 'blob':
    63→      return '60% 40% 30% 70% / 60% 30% 70% 40%'
    64→    default:
    65→      return '50%'
    66→  }
    67→}
    68→
    69→function resolveBaseHue(
    70→  seed?: string,
    71→  baseColor?: string,
    72→): { hue: number; hash: number } {
    73→  if (baseColor) {
    74→    const [h] = hexToHsl(baseColor)
    75→    return { hue: h, hash: hashString(baseColor) }
    76→  }
    77→  const hash = hashString(seed!)
    78→  const hueIndex = hash % SOFT_HUES.length
    79→  const baseHue = SOFT_HUES[hueIndex].hue
    80→  const hueOffset = ((hash >> 8) % 30) - 15
    81→  return { hue: (baseHue + hueOffset + 360) % 360, hash }
    82→}
    83→
    84→export function generateGlowOrbs(options: {
    85→  seed?: string
    86→  baseColor?: string
    87→}): GlowOrb[] {
    88→  const { hue: baseHue, hash } = resolveBaseHue(options.seed, options.baseColor)
    89→  const random = seededRandom(hash)
    90→
    91→  const orbCount = 3 + Math.floor(random() * 4)
    92→  const shapes: GlowShape[] = ['circle', 'ellipse-h', 'ellipse-v', 'blob']
    93→  const orbs: GlowOrb[] = []
    94→
    95→  for (let i = 0; i < orbCount; i++) {
    96→    const isMain = i === 0
    97→
    98→    const x = isMain ? 50 : 10 + random() * 80
    99→    const y = isMain ? 15 : 5 + random() * 50
   100→
   101→    const baseSize = isMain ? 400 : 100 + random() * 180
   102→    const width = baseSize * (0.8 + random() * 0.8)
   103→    const height = baseSize * (0.6 + random() * 0.8)
   104→
   105→    const blur = isMain ? 80 + random() * 40 : 40 + random() * 60
   106→    const opacity = isMain ? 0.5 + random() * 0.2 : 0.2 + random() * 0.3
   107→
   108→    const hueOffset = (random() - 0.5) * 60
   109→    const hue = (baseHue + hueOffset + 360) % 360
   110→    const saturation = Math.max(15, Math.min(50, 30 + (random() - 0.5) * 20))
   111→    const lightnessLight = Math.max(
   112→      80,
   113→      Math.min(95, 88 + (random() - 0.5) * 10),
   114→    )
   115→    const lightnessDark = Math.max(10, Math.min(30, 20 + (random() - 0.5) * 14))
   116→
   117→    const shape = isMain
   118→      ? 'ellipse-h'
   119→      : shapes[Math.floor(random() * shapes.length)]
   120→    const delay = isMain ? 0.1 : 0.3 + i * 0.15
   121→
   122→    orbs.push({
   123→      id: i,
   124→      x,
   125→      y,
   126→      width,
   127→      height,
   128→      blur,
   129→      opacity,
   130→      hue,
   131→      saturation,
   132→      lightnessLight,
   133→      lightnessDark,
   134→      shape,
   135→      delay,
   136→    })
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  return orbs
   140→}
   141→
   142→export function renderGlowOrbStyle(orb: GlowOrb): React.CSSProperties {
   143→  return {
   144→    position: 'absolute',
   145→    left: `${orb.x}%`,
   146→    top: `${orb.y * 6}px`,
   147→    width: `${orb.width}px`,
   148→    height: `${orb.height}px`,
   149→    background: `light-dark(hsl(${orb.hue}, ${orb.saturation}%, ${orb.lightnessLight}%), hsl(${orb.hue}, ${orb.saturation}%, ${orb.lightnessDark}%))`,
   150→    borderRadius: getShapeBorderRadius(orb.shape),
   151→    filter: `blur(${orb.blur}px)`,
   152→    opacity: 0,
   153→    transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.6)',
   154→    animation: `glow-enter 1.2s ease-out ${orb.delay}s forwards`,
   155→  }
   156→}
   157→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/lib/helper.server.ts`

```text
     1→import 'server-only'
     2→
     3→import chroma from 'chroma-js'
     4→import { headers } from 'next/headers'
     5→import uniqolor from 'uniqolor'
     6→
     7→import { isDev } from './env'
     8→
     9→export function escapeXml(unsafe: string) {
    10→  return unsafe.replaceAll(/[<>&'"]/g, (c) => {
    11→    switch (c) {
    12→      case '<': {
    13→        return '&lt;'
    14→      }
    15→      case '>': {
    16→        return '&gt;'
    17→      }
    18→      case '&': {
    19→        return '&amp;'
    20→      }
    21→      case "'": {
    22→        return '&apos;'
    23→      }
    24→      case '"': {
    25→        return '&quot;'
    26→      }
    27→    }
    28→    return c
    29→  })
    30→}
    31→
    32→export const getOgUrl = async (
    33→  type: 'post' | 'note' | 'page',
    34→  data: any,
    35→  locale?: string,
    36→) => {
    37→  const host = (await headers())?.get('host')
    38→  const ogUrl = new URL(
    39→    `${isDev ? 'http' : 'https'}://${host}/${locale || 'zh'}/og`,
    40→  )
    41→  ogUrl.searchParams.set(
    42→    'data',
    43→    encodeURIComponent(
    44→      JSON.stringify({
    45→        type,
    46→        ...data,
    47→      }),
    48→    ),
    49→  )
    50→  return ogUrl
    51→}
    52→export const getBackgroundGradientBySeed = (seed: string) => {
    53→  const bgAccent = uniqolor(seed, {
    54→    saturation: [40, 55],
    55→    lightness: [45, 55],
    56→  }).color
    57→
    58→  const bgAccentLight = uniqolor(seed, {
    59→    saturation: [35, 45],
    60→    lightness: [65, 75],
    61→  }).color
    62→
    63→  const bgAccentUltraLight = uniqolor(seed, {
    64→    saturation: [25, 35],
    65→    lightness: [80, 88],
    66→  }).color
    67→
    68→  return [bgAccent, bgAccentLight, bgAccentUltraLight]
    69→}
    70→export const getBackgroundGradientByBaseColor = (baseColor: string) => {
    71→  const bgAccent = chroma(baseColor).set('hsl.s', 0.45).set('hsl.l', 0.5).hex()
    72→  const bgAccentLight = chroma(baseColor)
    73→    .set('hsl.s', 0.4)
    74→    .set('hsl.l', 0.7)
    75→    .hex()
    76→  const bgAccentUltraLight = chroma(baseColor)
    77→    .set('hsl.s', 0.3)
    78→    .set('hsl.l', 0.85)
    79→    .hex()
    80→
    81→  return [bgAccent, bgAccentLight, bgAccentUltraLight]
    82→}
    83→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-28 16:37:15Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the issue. Let me trace the color flow:

1. `PageColorGradient` gets `seed` or `baseColor`
2. For accent color: it uses `getBackgroundGradientByBaseColor` or `getBackgroundGradientBySeed` to get `bgAccent`, then passes it to `generateSingleColorStyle` which generates CSS with that color for both light and dark themes
3. For glow orbs: it uses `generateGlowOrbs` which calls `resolveBaseHue` to get the base hue

The problem: The accent color comes from `getBackgroundGradientBySeed`/`getBackgroundGradientByBaseColor` which uses `uniqolor` or chroma to derive a color, while the glow orbs use a completely different algorithm (`resolveBaseHue`) that either:


- For `baseColor`: extracts hue from the hex color via `hexToHsl`
- For `seed`: uses a hash to pick from `SOFT_HUES` array

These two derivation methods will produce different colors/hues for the same seed/baseColor input. The user wants the accent color to match the glow orbs' color, so I need to derive the accent color from the same base hue that `generateGlowOrbs` uses—specifically from the main orb's hue.

The main orb gets its hue from `resolveBaseHue`, which determines the starting point before the random offset is applied. For the accent color, I should extract that same base hue and use it to generate a matching accent in OKLCH format, rather than trying to reverse-engineer it from the glow orbs' HSL values. the accent color needs to work across both light and dark themes, so I should pick a middle-ground lightness value that complements the main orb's hue and saturation rather than trying to match the theme-specific lightness values.

The cleanest path forward is to use the hue from the main orb that's already generated, construct a hex color with appropriate saturation and lightness using chroma, and pass that single color to `generateSingleColorStyle` which will handle the rest.

Writing the component implementation... I should verify whether those gradient functions are called anywhere else in the codebase before removing them entirely.
</details></think>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./apps/web/src/lib/color.ts`

```text
     1→const getRandomColor = (
     2→  lightness: [number, number],
     3→  saturation: [number, number],
     4→  hue: number,
     5→) => {
     6→  const satAccent = Math.floor(
     7→    Math.random() * (saturation[1] - saturation[0] + 1) + saturation[0],
     8→  )
     9→  const lightAccent = Math.floor(
    10→    Math.random() * (lightness[1] - lightness[0] + 1) + lightness[0],
    11→  )
    12→
    13→  // Generate the background color by increasing the lightness and decreasing the saturation
    14→  const satBackground = satAccent > 30 ? satAccent - 30 : 0
    15→  const lightBackground = lightAccent < 80 ? lightAccent + 20 : 100
    16→
    17→  return {
    18→    accent: `hsl(${hue}, ${satAccent}%, ${lightAccent}%)`,
    19→    background: `hsl(${hue}, ${satBackground}%, ${lightBackground}%)`,
    20→  }
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function stringToHue(str: string) {
    24→  let hash = 0
    25→  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    26→    hash = str.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash)
    27→  }
    28→  const hue = hash % 360
    29→  return hue < 0 ? hue + 360 : hue
    30→}
    31→
    32→export const getColorScheme = (hue?: number) => {
    33→  const baseHue = hue ?? Math.floor(Math.random() * 361)
    34→  const complementaryHue = (baseHue + 180) % 360
    35→
    36→  // For light theme, we limit the lightness between 40 and 70 to avoid too bright colors for accent
    37→  const lightColors = getRandomColor([40, 70], [70, 90], baseHue)
    38→
    39→  // For dark theme, we limit the lightness between 20 and 50 to avoid too dark colors for accent
    40→  const darkColors = getRandomColor([20, 50], [70, 90], complementaryHue)
    41→
    42→  return {
    43→    light: {
    44→      accent: lightColors.accent,
    45→      background: lightColors.background,
    46→    },
    47→    dark: {
    48→      accent: darkColors.accent,
    49→      background: darkColors.background,
    50→    },
    51→  }
    52→}
    53→export function addAlphaToHex(hex: string, alpha: number): string {
    54→  if (!/^#(?:[A-F0-9]{3}){1,2}$/i.test(hex)) {
    55→    throw new Error('Invalid hex color value')
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  let color = ''
    59→  if (hex.length === 4) {
    60→    color = `#${[1, 2, 3]
    61→      .map(
    62→        (index) =>
    63→          Number.parseInt(hex.charAt(index), 16).toString(16) +
    64→          Number.parseInt(hex.charAt(index), 16).toString(16),
    65→      )
    66→      .join('')}`
    67→  } else {
    68→    color = hex
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  const r = Number.parseInt(color.slice(1, 3), 16)
    72→  const g = Number.parseInt(color.slice(3, 5), 16)
    73→  const b = Number.parseInt(color.slice(5, 7), 16)
    74→
    75→  return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`
    76→}
    77→
    78→export function addAlphaToHSL(hsl: string, alpha: number): string {
    79→  if (!/^hsl\(\d{1,3},\s*[\d.]+%,\s*[\d.]+%\)$/.test(hsl)) {
    80→    throw new Error('Invalid HSL color value')
    81→  }
    82→
    83→  const hsla = `${hsl.slice(0, -1)}, ${alpha})`
    84→  return hsla.replace('hsl', 'hsla')
    85→}
    86→
    87→export function hexToHsl(hex: string) {
    88→  // Remove the '#' symbol from the hex code
    89→  hex = hex.replace('#', '')
    90→
    91→  // Convert hex values to RGB
    92→  const r = Number.parseInt(hex.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255
    93→  const g = Number.parseInt(hex.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255
    94→  const b = Number.parseInt(hex.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255
    95→
    96→  // Find the minimum and maximum values among R, G, and B
    97→  const min = Math.min(r, g, b)
    98→  const max = Math.max(r, g, b)
    99→
   100→  // Calculate the hue
   101→  let h = 0
   102→  switch (max) {
   103→    case min: {
   104→      h = 0 // No hue for achromatic colors
   105→
   106→      break
   107→    }
   108→    case r: {
   109→      h = ((g - b) / (max - min)) % 6
   110→
   111→      break
   112→    }
   113→    case g: {
   114→      h = (2 + (b - r) / (max - min)) % 6
   115→
   116→      break
   117→    }
   118→    default: {
   119→      h = (4 + (r - g) / (max - min)) % 6
   120→    }
   121→  }
   122→  h = Math.round(h * 60)
   123→
   124→  // Calculate the lightness
   125→  const l = (max + min) / 2
   126→
   127→  // Calculate the saturation
   128→  let s = 0
   129→  if (max !== min) {
   130→    s = (max - min) / (1 - Math.abs(2 * l - 1))
   131→  }
   132→  s = Math.round(s * 100)
   133→
   134→  // Return the HSL values as a string
   135→  return [h, s, Math.round(l * 100)]
   136→}
   137→
   138→export function generateTransitionColors(
   139→  startColor: string,
   140→  targetColor: string,
   141→  step: number,
   142→): string[] {
   143→  // Convert startColor and targetColor to RGB values
   144→  const startRed = Number.parseInt(startColor.slice(1, 3), 16)
   145→  const startGreen = Number.parseInt(startColor.slice(3, 5), 16)
   146→  const startBlue = Number.parseInt(startColor.slice(5, 7), 16)
   147→
   148→  const targetRed = Number.parseInt(targetColor.slice(1, 3), 16)
   149→  const targetGreen = Number.parseInt(targetColor.slice(3, 5), 16)
   150→  const targetBlue = Number.parseInt(targetColor.slice(5, 7), 16)
   151→
   152→  // Calculate increments for each color channel
   153→  const redIncrement = (targetRed - startRed) / step
   154→  const greenIncrement = (targetGreen - startGreen) / step
   155→  const blueIncrement = (targetBlue - startBlue) / step
   156→
   157→  const transitionColors: string[] = []
   158→
   159→  // Generate transition colors
   160→  for (let i = 0; i < step; i++) {
   161→    // Calculate transition color values
   162→    const transitionRed = Math.round(startRed + redIncrement * i)
   163→    const transitionGreen = Math.round(startGreen + greenIncrement * i)
   164→    const transitionBlue = Math.round(startBlue + blueIncrement * i)
   165→
   166→    // Convert RGB values to hex format
   167→    const hexColor = `#${(
   168→      (1 << 24) |
   169→      (transitionRed << 16) |
   170→      (transitionGreen << 8) |
   171→      transitionBlue
   172→    )
   173→      .toString(16)
   174→      .slice(1)}`
   175→
   176→    // Add transition color to the result array
   177→    transitionColors.push(hexColor)
   178→  }
   179→
   180→  return Array.from(new Set(transitionColors))
   181→}
   182→
   183→export const hexToRgbString = (hex: string) => {
   184→  const match = hex.replace(/^#/, '').match(/.{1,2}/g)
   185→  if (!match) {
   186→    throw new Error('Invalid hex color')
   187→  }
   188→
   189→  const [r, g, b] = match.map((x) => Number.parseInt(x, 16))
   190→  return `${r} ${g} ${b}`
   191→}
   192→
   193→export const isHexColor = (color: string) => {
   194→  return /^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i.test(color)
   195→}
   196→
   197→export const isRGBColor = (color: string) => {
   198→  return /^rgb\(\d{1,3},\s*\d{1,3},\s*\d{1,3}\)$/.test(color)
   199→}
   200→export const isRGBAColor = (color: string) => {
   201→  return /^rgba\(\d{1,3},\s*\d{1,3},\s*\d{1,3},\s*(?:0?\.\d+|1(?:\.0+)?)\)$/.test(
   202→    color,
   203→  )
   204→}
   205→
   206→export const withOpacity = (color: string, opacity: number) => {
   207→  switch (true) {
   208→    case isHexColor(color): {
   209→      // Convert decimal opacity to hex (0-255)
   210→      const alpha = Math.round(opacity * 255)
   211→        .toString(16)
   212→        .padStart(2, '0')
   213→      return `${color}${alpha}`
   214→    }
   215→    case isRGBColor(color): {
   216→      const [r, g, b] = color.match(/\d+/g)!.map(Number)
   217→      return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${opacity})`
   218→    }
   219→    case isRGBAColor(color): {
   220→      const [r, g, b] = color.match(/\d+/g)!.map(Number)
   221→      return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${opacity})`
   222→    }
   223→    default: {
   224→      return color
   225→    }
   226→  }
   227→}
   228→export const rgbStringToRgb = (hex: string) => {
   229→  const [r, g, b, a] = hex.split(' ').map((s) => Number.parseFloat(s))
   230→  return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${a || 1})`
   231→}
   232→
   233→export const getLuminance = (hexColor: string) => {
   234→  const rgb = Number.parseInt(hexColor.replace('#', ''), 16)
   235→  const r = (rgb >> 16) & 0xff
   236→  const g = (rgb >> 8) & 0xff
   237→  const b = (rgb >> 0) & 0xff
   238→  return (0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b) / 255
   239→}
   240→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-28 16:37:28Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the issue clearly. The problem is:

1. `PageColorGradient` derives `bgAccent` from `getBackgroundGradientBySeed`/`getBackgroundGradientByBaseColor` (which uses `uniqolor` or chroma with specific saturation/lightness)
2. `generateGlowOrbs` derives its hue from `resolveBaseHue` (which uses `hexToHsl` for baseColor or `SOFT_HUES` for seed)

These two paths produce completely different colors. The user wants to align accent color with glow orbs.

The fix: derive accent color from the glow orbs' main orb hue instead of using `getBackgroundGradientBySeed`/`getBackgroundGradientByBaseColor`.


I can either export `resolveBaseHue` from `glow.server.ts` or just pull the hue from the main orb directly. The simplest approach is to use the main orb's HSL values to construct a hex color with chroma, then pass that to `generateSingleColorStyle`. Let me check what's already imported in PageColorGradient and whether I need to add chroma.

Looking at the imports, I need to remove the gradient helper imports and add chroma instead, then generate the orbs first so I can extract the main orb's hue for the accent color.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-28 16:37:29Z)**_

问题明确。accent color 由 `getBackgroundGradientBySeed`/`getBackgroundGradientByBaseColor`（uniqolor/chroma 路径）生成，与 `generateGlowOrbs` 的 `resolveBaseHue`（SOFT_HUES/hexToHsl 路径）完全不同。

以 glow orbs 主 orb 的 hue 为准，导出 accent color。

 `./apps/web/src/components/common/PageColorGradient.tsx`

```text
     1→import 'server-only'
     2→
     3→import chroma from 'chroma-js'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { generateSingleColorStyle } from '~/lib/accent-color'
     7→import { generateGlowOrbs, renderGlowOrbStyle } from '~/lib/glow.server'
     8→
     9→import { RootPortal } from '../ui/portal'
    10→
    11→export const PageColorGradient: FC<{
    12→  seed?: string
    13→  baseColor?: string
    14→}> = async ({ seed, baseColor }) => {
    15→  const orbs = generateGlowOrbs({ seed, baseColor })
    16→
    17→  const mainOrb = orbs[0]
    18→  const bgAccent = chroma
    19→    .hsl(mainOrb.hue, mainOrb.saturation / 100, 0.5)
    20→    .hex()
    21→
    22→  const cssContent = await generateSingleColorStyle(bgAccent, {
    23→    withNoise: true,
    24→    useThemedClass: true,
    25→  })
    26→
    27→  return (
    28→    <>
    29→      <RootPortal>
    30→        <div className="page-glow-container">
    31→          {orbs.map((orb) => (
    32→            <div
    33→              key={orb.id}
    34→              style={
    35→                {
    36→                  ...renderGlowOrbStyle(orb),
    37→                  '--glow-opacity': orb.opacity,
    38→                } as React.CSSProperties
    39→              }
    40→            />
    41→          ))}
    42→          <div className="page-glow-mask" />
    43→        </div>
    44→      </RootPortal>
    45→      <style
    46→        id="accent-color-style"
    47→        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    48→          __html: cssContent,
    49→        }}
    50→      />
    51→    </>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
```
